title: Unable to compile generated C++ file with systemverilog with struct input

features.name: struct definition with 256-bit wide bitfield
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with a logic bitfield of exactly 256 bits width

features.name: struct as module input port
features.description: Code should include a module input port declared using a struct type

features.name: struct member access in sequential block
features.description: Code should include struct member access inside an always_ff sequential block
